nodes.name: Validar Input
nodes.notes: Valida instancia_nome e injeta constantes de ambiente (Evolution API URL, chave, webhook URL destino)

nodes.name: Configurar Webhook Evolution
nodes.notes: Registra ou atualiza o webhook na Evolution API apontando para o ML-CAPTURA pipeline

parameters.query:
SELECT
  ie.id AS instancia_id,
  ie.instance_name,
  COALESCE(np.numero_whatsapp, '') AS numero_whatsapp
FROM _plataforma.instancias_evolution ie
LEFT JOIN _plataforma.numeros_projeto np ON np.instancia_id = ie.id AND np.ativo = true
WHERE ie.instance_name = '{{ $('Validar Input').item.json.instancia_nome }}'
LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Lookup Instancia DB
nodes.notes: Busca instancia_id e numero_whatsapp para persistir na webhooks_config

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ml_captura.webhooks_config
  (instancia_id, numero_whatsapp, webhook_url, status, metadados)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.instancia_id }}',
  '{{ $json.numero_whatsapp }}',
  '{{ $('Validar Input').item.json.webhook_url }}',
  'ativo',
  '{"events": ["MESSAGES_UPSERT", "MESSAGES_UPDATE", "CONNECTION_UPDATE"]}'
)
ON CONFLICT (instancia_id) DO UPDATE SET
  webhook_url  = EXCLUDED.webhook_url,
  status       = 'ativo',
  erro_descricao = NULL,
  metadados    = EXCLUDED.metadados,
  updated_at   = NOW()
RETURNING id, instancia_id, webhook_url, status, updated_at

nodes.name: Upsert webhooks_config
nodes.notes: Idempotente via ON CONFLICT(instancia_id) — pode ser chamado quantas vezes necessario
